introSection: Monte Makaya was a steel roller coaster located at Terra Encantada in Rio De Janeiro, Brazil.

sections.title: History
sections.content: The coaster would be standing but not operating after closing in June of 2010, eventually being taken down with the rest of the park in March of 2016. It was subsequently sold to Mirabilandia where it remains in storage.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: The coaster opened with 2 trains in operation, but one train was destroyed in a station fire in 2004.

fullText:
Monte Makaya was a steel roller coaster located at Terra Encantada in Rio De Janeiro, Brazil.

The coaster would be standing but not operating after closing in June of 2010, eventually being taken down with the rest of the park in March of 2016. It was subsequently sold to Mirabilandia where it remains in storage.



White track and supports.

The coaster opened with 2 trains in operation, but one train was destroyed in a station fire in 2004.
